idea.title: Power Wash
idea.hook: Aim the pressure jet and blast layers of grime off filthy objects until they gleam — hit 100% clean before the water tank runs dry.
idea.hook_ru: Наведите струю мойки и сбейте слои грязи с грязных предметов до блеска — достигните 100% чистоты, пока не кончилась вода в баке.
idea.prototype: A satisfying power-washing game. A grimy object fills the screen as a grid of grime cells over a procedurally drawn clean shape (car, window, statue, sign, gnome). The player holds and drags a pressure-washer jet over the surface; grime under the jet radius is stripped layer-by-layer (heavy grime -> stain -> clean), revealing the gleaming surface beneath with a water-spray + brown-fleck VFX and a clean chime when sections finish. A big '% CLEAN' meter drives the goal from frame one; reach 98% to clear the object. Non-timer pressure is a WATER TANK budget that drains while spraying and refills only while the trigger is released. 5 levels with rising grime density + bigger tanks, plus a persistent nozzle-power meta upgrade bought between levels with earned coins.
idea.mutation_of: Clean Sweep Donut / ice_sweeper (our cleaning winners)
idea.why_novel: pressure-washing with layered grime + water-tank budget + nozzle meta — a fresh tactile mechanic in our cleaning family that isn't a clone of clean_sweep, ice_cleanup, apartment, varnish_restore, polish_pass, merge_cleaners or satisfying_spill. The mask-driven layered-grime reveal + resource-scarcity (water) pressure axis are both new to the portfolio.
idea.non_timer_pressure: water tank budget (resource scarcity): water drains while spraying at SPRAY_DRAIN=42/sec, refills at TANK_REGEN=55/sec only while NOT spraying; per-level tanks 1700..2800. Holding the trigger on empty/clean space empties the tank to 0 in ~15s.
idea.lose_condition: tank empty before clean target: gs='GAMEOVER' when water<=0 AND cleanPct<CLEAN_TARGET (98)

synthesizer_brief: This is a portfolio-KNOWLEDGE pick (inside-out, from our own metrics). It extends our cleaning/satisfying family — our HIGHEST like-ratio genre at 👍11/👎0 (100% like ratio), led by Clean Sweep Donut (slug clean_sweep, 36.6s/play, 19 plays, 👍5/👎0) and ice_sweeper (👍4/👎0). The build deliberately bakes in the two gating comment requests: (1) ice_sweeper asked for '2-3 layered breakable layers, add sounds, maybe some meta upgrades' — delivered as GRIME_LAYERS up to 3 (heavy->stain->clean), WebAudio spray hiss + clean chime, and a persistent nozzle-power upgrade (1..5) bought with coins between levels; (2) satisfying_spill asked for 'clear lose conditions, need more levels, meta, develop further' — delivered as an explicit OUT-OF-WATER lose state, 5 escalating levels, and the nozzle meta. The crystal-clear goal (big '% CLEAN' meter + 'Hold to blast the grime!' prompt from frame one) answers the ice_sweeper/satisfying_spill 'unclear goal' flags. CTR uses the satisfying_cleanup archetype: before/after mess, visible transformation, high tactile contrast (clean stripe blasted through brown grime).

sources.snippet: cleaning genre — 3 games · 46.4s/play avg · 28 plays · 👍11/👎0 (100% like ratio); Clean Sweep Donut (clean_sweep, cleaning) 36.6s/play · 19 plays · 👍5/👎0 (100%). Player comments: ice_sweeper — 'implement 2-3 layered breakable layers, add sounds maybe some meta upgrades'; satisfying_spill — 'Lose conditions are unclear, need more levels, meta, develop further'.

satisfying_cleanup — 6 refs, weight 478; examples: Element Playground, Zen Mower, Sandbox: Particle World, Liquids Sort Puzzle. Archetype: before/after mess, cleaning/destruction path, visible transformation and high tactile contrast.

alternatives.title: Rust Buster
alternatives.hook: Scrub and grind rust off old metal tools and reveal shining steel, managing a wearing-down wire brush instead of a water tank.
alternatives.why_novel: Same layered-reveal satisfaction but the resource is a brush that dulls (tool-wear scarcity) rather than water — considered but too close to varnish_restore's restore loop.

alternatives.title: Foam Layers
alternatives.hook: Spray foam to dissolve stacked stains in the right order — top grime must go before the stain underneath reacts.
alternatives.why_novel: Adds an ordering puzzle to the layered cleaning, but the ordering constraint risks the 'unclear goal' problem the comments already flagged, so passed over for the simpler blast-everything goal.

alternatives.title: Pollen Sweep
alternatives.hook: Blow drifting pollen/dust off a surface with an air blower while a wind gust keeps re-coating it.
alternatives.why_novel: Encroaching re-mess as the pressure axis instead of a finite tank — fun but the re-coating risks feeling unfair/endless, and a finite tank gives a cleaner win/lose read.
